name: Gokul Soundarapandian
professional_summary: Computer Science undergraduate with hands-on experience in GenAI systems, RAG pipelines, and automation workflows. Skilled in building agent-based solutions and deploying functional AI prototypes for real-world applications.

responsibilities: Built RAG pipelines that significantly improved retrieval accuracy for complex knowledge queries.
Developed multi-agent workflows for automation and enterprise data processing tasks.
Integrated transcription services and deployed production-ready APIs using FastAPI and Docker.

projects.name: Restaurant FAQ Chatbot
projects.description: Developed a RAG-based support system enabling customers to query menus and live offers, featuring an admin panel for dynamic knowledge base management via file and text uploads.

projects.name: MCP Search Chatbot
projects.description: Advanced AI agent leveraging Model Context Protocol (MCP) to execute simultaneous real-time web searches and structured database queries, delivering enriched, context-aware responses.

projects.name: n8n Automation Workflows
projects.description: Designed integrated automation pipelines: a Google Drive-monitored transcription system and a multi-modal chatbot that transcribes and summarizes audio files into concise key points.

education.institution: Prince Dr. K. Vasudevan College of Engineering and Technology

achievements_and_activities: Team Leader - Smart India Hackathon (Internal Round)
Participant - Google Solution Challenge AI Agents Workshop
Freelance Video Editor and Graphic Designer
Interests: GenAI Automation, AI Engineering, Agentic Workflows
